D1数据初始化代码 ​

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS images (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  url TEXT NOT NULL,
  ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
  likes INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
);
